column1: AI/ML Hiring Task: Design Demand Prediction Engine
Build a system that predicts how many qty a new product design can sell based on past data (images + sales).
Click the link below to get the images:
Check the next sheet to get the Sales Data
1. How did you approach this problem? Explain full plan and execution.
2. How does your prediction system work? (logic/model)
3. What patterns did you find in the data?
5. If you had more time, how would you improve this system?
- Include README.md with Full Name, Mobile No and setup instructions.
We are not looking for perfect accuracy. We are evaluating your thinking, approach, and problem-solving ability.
